#+TITLE: Table Visualization Demo

#+PLOT: title:"Citas" ind:1 deps:(3 4) type:2d with:histograms transpose:yes file:"charts/cites.png"
| Sede      | Max cites | H-index | Score |
|-----------+-----------+---------+-------|
| Chile     |    257.72 |   21.39 |     5 |
| Stockholm |    134.19 |   14.33 |     3 |

| Label | Value |
|-------+-------|
| Bad   |     1 |

# END RECEIVE ORGTBL salesfigures

| Month | Days | Nr sold |
|-------+------+---------|
| Jan   |   23 |      55 |
| Feb   |   21 |      16 |
